name: Cook Theobaldo

sheet.name: Cook Theobaldo
sheet.background_story:
After the death of his only love, Aelira, he abandoned his life of violence, carrying with him the guilt and the desire to change his path. His new aspiration is simple yet nearly unattainable: to become a renowned chef in the Forsaken Lands, where only the most skilled can survive.

To achieve this, Theobaldo decides to enter a deadly tournament, a bloody competition where warriors and monsters vie for great rewards. The gold he earns will allow him to pay for a magical surgery to remove his wings – a symbol of his pain and past – and finally pursue his passion for cooking. Amid brutal battles and blood spilling, he meditates on how to achieve the perfection of meat.
